rules.pairing_strategy: Radical weight contrast. Headings are massive and bold (Chivo), body and data are stark, structured monospace (IBM Plex Mono).

typography.installation_commands: Use Google Fonts for Chivo and IBM Plex Mono

rules.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for standard text, use APCA guidelines.
rules.tints: Never use pure #000000 or #808080. Greys are slightly tinted with cool tones.
rules.hover: Explicit hover states. Active items must be highly visible (e.g., text changes to #002FA7 on hover or background changes to #F4F4F5).

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-1, p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12. Generous padding inside bordered containers.

grid_strategy.name: The 'Control Room' Grid
grid_strategy.rules: Use a border-collapse style layout where possible, or tight gaps (gap-4) with strict 1px borders. Every pixel must be utilized. No jagged bottoms.

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all data, tables, and text. Optical alignment for icons.

components.cards: Flat background (White or #F4F4F5), sharp edges (rounded-none), 1px solid border (border-gray-200). NO shadows. On hover: border-gray-400, no lift.
components.buttons: Rectangular, sharp edges. Primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002080]. Secondary: bg-white border border-gray-200 text-[#09090B] hover:bg-gray-100.
components.inputs: Sharp edges (rounded-none), 1px border. Focus state: ring-2 ring-[#002FA7] ring-offset-2 ring-offset-white.
components.charts: Recharts. Use sharp angles, no rounded corners on bars. Custom tooltip with sharp borders and mono font. Monochrome or high-contrast palette for pie/bar charts (e.g., #002FA7, #335CFF, #668AFF, #99B8FF).
components.icons: lucide-react. Use 1.5x scale (24px) for emphasis, sharp stroke widths (1.5 or 2).
components.history_sidebar: Left sidebar on desktop (col-span-1), sticky. List of recent users with stark hover states.
components.cache_indicator: Small badge: border border-[#002FA7] text-[#002FA7] text-xs px-2 py-1 uppercase tracking-widest.

motion.hover: Instant or very fast transitions (100ms) for a snappy, technical feel.
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-in (framer-motion) for grid items, moving from top-left to bottom-right.
motion.loading_skeletons: Sharp rectangular blocks pulsing with 10% grey to 20% grey. No rounded corners.

empty_state_bg.description: A minimalist, high-contrast abstract technical background.
empty_state_bg.usage: Use this as a faint background image (opacity-20 or grayscale) for the empty state when no user has been searched yet.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Google Fonts for 'Chivo' (400, 700, 900) and 'IBM Plex Mono' (400, 600) in index.html.
Implement a 2-column layout on desktop: Left sidebar (w-64) for 'Search' and 'Recent History'. Main area for the dashboard.
The main dashboard should follow 'Control Room' grid layout: top row for Profile Overview (span full), next row for 4 stat widgets (span 1 each), bottom area for 'Top 5 Repos' and 'Languages Chart'.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons. Do NOT use placeholder text or generic avatars; use GitHub's API avatar URL.
Implement 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='search-input', data-testid='submit-button', data-testid='repo-link').
Use Recharts for the languages distribution chart (bar or pie). Restrict colors to high-contrast blues and greys.
In the empty state, use the 'empty_state_bg' image as a background with an overlay, and center a large search input.
